name: Sword Swallower of the Pit
text:
First strike
When Sword Swallower of the Pit enters the battlefield, roll a six-sided die. On a 1, the trick goes wrong: it deals 3 damage to you. On a 2 through 6, it deals that much damage to target creature an opponent controls. Showmanship has consequences.
flavorText: Forty years, ten thousand shows, one bad afternoon. The odds were never in his throat's favor.
